bugs.report_text: The footer section is overlapping the main content area with excessive negative spacing, making the review section partially hidden.
bugs.neg_code: <footer className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-gray-900 text-white py-16 md:py-20 mt-24">
bugs.pos_code: <footer className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 via-gray-800 to-gray-900 text-white py-16 md:py-20 -mt-96">

bugs.report_text: The flight search results are stacked vertically in a single column instead of displaying in a responsive multi-column grid layout.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-4 items-center">

bugs.report_text: The flight icon is not rendering at the correct size due to an invalid styling class, appearing distorted or missing.
The logo text is displaying in a dark gray color that fails to contrast properly against the navigation bar background.
The promotional card is positioned absolutely, causing it to float over and overlap other page content unexpectedly.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 via-blue-600 to-blue-700 rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 text-white hover:shadow-2xl transition duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-2 group overflow-hidden relative">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 via-blue-600 to-blue-700 rounded-2xl shadow-xl p-8 text-white hover:shadow-2xl transition duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-2 group overflow-hidden relative absolute">

bugs.report_text: The review comment text is rendered in a very light color that becomes nearly invisible against the light card background.
The search form fields are not aligning correctly in the container due to an invalid grid configuration value.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-3 md:gap-4 items-end">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-13 gap-3 md:gap-4 items-end">

bugs.report_text: The date and time input fields are missing their border styling due to an invalid class name, appearing unstyled.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="md:col-span-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-0 border-2 border-gray-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative hover:border-blue-300 transition">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="md:col-span-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-0 border-2 border-gray-2 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative hover:border-blue-300 transition">

bugs.report_text: The flight swap button is hidden behind other page elements with an inverted stacking order, making it impossible to click.
bugs.neg_code: className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-white rounded-full p-3 border-2 border-gray-200 shadow-md hover:bg-blue-50 hover:border-blue-500 hover:shadow-lg transition duration-300 z-10"
bugs.pos_code: className="absolute left-1/2 top-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-white rounded-full p-3 border-2 border-gray-200 shadow-md hover:bg-blue-50 hover:border-blue-500 hover:shadow-lg transition duration-300 -z-10"

bugs.report_text: The search button section has excessive negative spacing that causes it to shift and separate from the rest of the form.
